examples: The LORD said, "Take a heifer with you and say, 'I have come to sacrifice to the LORD."'
The priest is to take some cedar wood, hyssop and scarlet wool and throw them onto the burning heifer.
The unlucky heifer was exploring the drum of a fly-tipped washing machine when its head became trapped.
Heifer International, which donates livestock and training to impoverished farmers, is one of many plausible choices.
This girl had been to school and received a cow by a project like Heifer International.
